login.title: Hey there! 👋
login.subtitle: Enter your email to get started.

canceled.title: Session canceled
canceled.subtitle: Please return to the previous page

completed.title: Success!
completed.subtitle: You can now continue where you left on desktop

error.title: Session is not valid
error.subtitle: Please go back to the previous page.

expired.title: Session expired
expired.subtitle: For security reasons, this session has timed out. Please go back to the previous page.

register.title: Liveness check
register.subtitle: We need to verify that you're a real person.

retry.title: Biometrics not recognized
retry.subtitle: You can try biometrics again or you can do this next time you use Footprint.
